text: - iii. Primary and Non-Contributory. Each  policy  required  in  this  Section, including primary, excess, and/or umbrella liability, shall provide that the insurance  provided  to  the  Additional  Insureds  is  primary  and  noncontributory, such that no other insurance or self-insured retention carried or held by Owner shall be called upon to contribute to a loss covered by insurance for the named insured, regardless such other insurance is primary, umbrella, contingent or excess.
